evidence: Most acceptance criteria are concrete and map directly to service-level tests.
dimensions.fix_expectation: Keep AC behavior-oriented and preserve direct testability.

evidence: The document uses concrete types, error messages, and scope limits without vague qualifiers.
dimensions.fix_expectation: Do not reintroduce broad wording while repairing other sections.

evidence: The IO-body boundary case is described in prose but not materialized as an acceptance criterion.
dimensions.fix_expectation: Add an explicit falsifiable AC for the IO pass-through contract.

evidence: from_env depends on external S3_* runtime values, but the spec has no Preconditions section or stop condition.
dimensions.fix_expectation: Move external runtime prerequisites into a dedicated Preconditions section or remove them from scope.

evidence: The implementation is mostly grounded, but runtime wiring through from_env is weakly evidenced without explicit preconditions.
dimensions.fix_expectation: Align grounding with existing files and isolate external runtime wiring from the core implementation contract.
